output: Implemented batch 6 / T6 by extending the existing editor test surface in-place: added pure interaction decision-table assertions, expanded provider publication coverage, added touch trim gating and reachable shot-group touch-action coverage, added tablet touch-vs-mouse drag routing and touch move-mode drag arming coverage, extended clip overflow touch-entry coverage, and added deferred-save regression coverage proving saves stay blocked until both drag and resize are idle. Verified with type-checking and a single full Vitest run across the required modules, then checkpointed the batch state to `.megaplan/plans/create-a-concrete-mobile-and-20260410-0149/execution_batch_6.json`.

task_updates.executor_notes: Extended the existing editor coverage without adding a second save path or new standalone suites. Added pure interaction decision-table assertions to `VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx`, expanded `TimelineCanvas.test.tsx` to verify touch trim-handle gating and reachable touch shot-group actions, expanded `useClipDrag.test.tsx` to cover tablet touch-vs-mouse drag routing and touch move-mode drag arming, expanded `ClipAction.test.tsx` to cover labeled visible overflow entry points for multi-selection, expanded `PreviewPersistence.test.tsx` to lock the phone-mode touch target regression, and expanded `useTimelinePersistence.test.tsx` to verify saves remain deferred until both drag and resize are idle. Verified with `npm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false` and `npm exec vitest run src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/TimelineCanvas.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useClipDrag.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/TimelineEditor/ClipAction.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/components/__tests__/PreviewPersistence.test.tsx src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelinePersistence.test.tsx`.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Yes. The updated automated coverage stays within the existing test infrastructure and now exercises the shared interaction contract across provider publication, pure routing decisions, touch trim gating, tablet touch-vs-mouse drag behavior, visible touch shot-group and clip action entry points, and deferred-save behavior. The persistence coverage still runs through the existing `interactionStateRef` gate and explicitly proves there is no second save path by keeping save deferred until both drag and resize are idle.
